oil.impact_path: WTI responds directly to crude supply, benchmark price, and refinery-demand news.

shipping_disruption.impact_path: WTI can move when tanker routes or chokepoints threaten crude flows into the physical oil market.

war_conflict.impact_path: Conflict matters to WTI when it raises the risk of crude supply loss, transit disruption, or an oil risk premium.

sanctions_trade.impact_path: Sanctions or export restrictions can tighten crude balances and change the flow of barrels across oil markets.

copper.impact_path: HG is most sensitive to copper-specific supply, demand, inventory, and smelter or mine news.

growth_activity.impact_path: HG often reflects expectations for industrial demand, construction, and manufacturing activity.

shipping_disruption.impact_path: HG can be affected when shipping delays disrupt concentrate or refined copper flows.

gold_precious.impact_path: Gold responds most directly to bullion-specific demand, central-bank buying, and investor positioning.

war_conflict.impact_path: Conflict affects Gold mainly through safe-haven demand and risk-off positioning.

inflation.impact_path: Inflation narratives matter to Gold when they alter real-rate or store-of-value expectations.

central_bank_policy.impact_path: Central-bank policy affects Gold through real yields, policy expectations, and dollar sensitivity.
US2Y responds most directly to Fed-path repricing, front-end rate expectations, and hawkish or dovish policy guidance.

inflation.impact_path: US2Y moves when inflation news shifts expected Fed tightening or easing through the front end of the Treasury curve.

interest_rates.impact_path: US2Y is highly sensitive to explicit moves in front-end rates, Treasury yields, and policy-rate expectations.

labour_market.impact_path: US2Y often reacts to labor-market news when payrolls or wages change the expected Fed path.

inflation.impact_path: US10Y moves when inflation or energy news shifts long-end inflation expectations and Treasury term pricing.

central_bank_policy.impact_path: US10Y reacts to Fed guidance when policy expectations feed into duration pricing and long-end Treasury yields.

interest_rates.impact_path: US10Y is directly affected by duration repricing, Treasury yield moves, and changes in the long-end rates outlook.

fiscal_debt.impact_path: US10Y can move on debt, deficit, or issuance news that changes Treasury supply and long-end term premium.

central_bank_policy.impact_path: DXY responds most directly to relative Fed-policy repricing, rate differentials, and hawkish or dovish dollar support.

interest_rates.impact_path: DXY often moves with U.S. rate differentials and Treasury-yield repricing versus other major currencies.

war_conflict.impact_path: DXY can strengthen when geopolitical stress drives safe-haven flows into dollars and away from risk-sensitive currencies.

inflation.impact_path: DXY reacts to inflation news when it changes the expected Fed path and relative policy support for the dollar.

earnings.impact_path: NDX is most directly affected by mega-cap earnings, AI spending narratives, and tech-sector guidance repricing.

interest_rates.impact_path: NDX is sensitive to discount-rate and real-yield repricing because long-duration tech cash flows are rate-sensitive.

central_bank_policy.impact_path: NDX reacts to Fed policy when tighter financial conditions compress valuations for long-duration growth assets.

growth_activity.impact_path: NDX can move on growth or activity shocks when they change risk appetite and expectations for tech demand.

central_bank_policy.impact_path: SPX reacts to Fed policy through discount rates, financial conditions, and broad equity risk appetite.

interest_rates.impact_path: SPX moves with broad rate-path repricing when Treasury yields and discount rates change equity valuations.

growth_activity.impact_path: SPX can de-rate on growth or activity fears when the market questions demand, margins, or risk appetite.

earnings.impact_path: SPX is affected by earnings when results or guidance change expectations for broad index profits rather than a single name.

labour_market.impact_path: SPX reacts to labour-market news when jobs and wages alter growth expectations or the expected Fed path.

crypto_regulation.impact_path: BTC is most directly affected by regulation that changes exchange access, ETF demand, custody, or stablecoin plumbing.

elections_policy.impact_path: Policy or election news matters to BTC when it changes the regulatory stance toward crypto markets.

banking_stress.impact_path: Banking stress affects BTC when it changes fiat onramps, custody confidence, or demand for non-bank assets.

shipping_disruption.impact_path: BDI responds directly to freight-market bottlenecks, vessel availability, and route disruption.

growth_activity.impact_path: BDI also reflects shifts in global industrial demand for bulk commodities and shipping capacity.
